sections.paragraph:
Original: נהלל נהלל

Transliteration: nahălâl nahălôl

Phonetic: nah-hal-awl'

BDB Definition:

Nahalal or Nahallal or Nahalol = "pasture"
  1. one of the cities of Zebulun given to the Merarite Levites
    1. site uncertain
    2. maybe modern 'Malul', a village in the plain of Esdraelon

Origin: the same as H5097

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
